name: Purfect Climb
short_description: Climb to the top in this challenging vertical platformer combining precision, skill and strategy. Face unique obstacles, overcome each drop and conquer the goal in a single breath. Can you reach the top?
detailed_description:
Get ready for a charming and challenging adventure in "Purfect Climb"! In this vertical platformer, you control an agile cat who must climb floating platforms to reach new heights. With a cute theme and relaxing music, each game becomes a unique journey, where each fall makes you start from where you fell, with no checkpoints. How high can you get?

"Purfect Climb" combines charming visual elements with a progressive difficulty that will test your skills and patience. Perfect for players who love challenges and roguelike games (but you don't die).

🐾 Explore charming scenarios and overcome unpredictable obstacles.

🎵 Enjoy a relaxing soundtrack that makes each attempt a new experience.

🚀 Beat your own records and share your achievements!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
